title: Johnny's biological notes
description: Enrich the variety of mobs in the game.
body:
# This mod will add more unique mobs to the minecraft, and we hope to have a unique mob for each biome!
![Johnny's biological notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17dc9516ccf41cf014485abdbb24ec30be409d80.png)
![The mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a503b33d61096396db6ae69ca37c204caa6fbc93.png)

**The mod now contains the following:**

*6 new mobs, some blocks and items, and some effects.*

All the features that have been implemented are complete.

![mob:Jelly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34649535326bdf347be2cc11cfcc02a4bd7f493f.png)
---
![mob:Tridacna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d080d253901f98e63cb726251d3a2be1039b926.png)
---
![mob:Loiter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a44e70692cf2e0773e8f964c2867bb20d9603643.png)

>***The mod is still under development and there may be some issue.***

**Thank you very much to my development team, if it were not for you, it would be very difficult for me to complete this mod!**
